channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘Simply by doing their daily work’: Meta tracks staff activity to teach AI how to replace them
item.description: Meta is using detailed tracking of employee activity to train AI systems that could eventually take over routine workplace tasks

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for April 23, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for April 23, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for April 23, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for April 23, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for April 23, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1769 on April 23 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: The Iranian women Trump ‘saved’ from execution are simultaneously real and AI-manipulated
item.description: On Wednesday, President Donald Trump claimed to have secured the release of eight Iranian women condemned to execution for protesting the regime. Only the night before, he had posted on Truth Social about the imminent executions of these women, quoting a screenshot that included a collage of eight glamorously backlit, soft-focus portraits. The photos of […]...

item.title: Google lance deux nouvelles puces pour s’adapter à l’ère des agents IA
item.description: Google a dévoilé mercredi deux nouvelles puces pour l’intelligence artificielle (IA), l’une pour entraîner les puissants nouveaux modèles d’IA générative, l’autre pour l’usage rapide et économique du quotidien, dont la demande pourrait exploser avec le rapide déploiement mondial des agents IA autonomes.

item.title: What John Ternus told me a decade ago and why I'm convinced he's the CEO Apple needs now
item.description: The mystery of what kind of CEO John Ternus will be for Apple may already have been solved by his own words.
